name: spacetimedb
description: SpacetimeDB skills for Codex: the data model, the spacetime CLI, and server and client SDK guidance for Rust, C#, TypeScript, C++, Unity, and Unreal. Includes an MCP server that lists your databases, reads schemas, runs SQL, and calls reducers with your CLI login.

interface.shortDescription: Skills to build apps, tools to operate your databases
interface.longDescription: Packages SpacetimeDB's agent skills so Codex can build and operate SpacetimeDB apps: private-by-default tables, reducers as the write path, the spacetime CLI, and server and client SDK references for Rust, C#, TypeScript, C++, Unity, and Unreal. Includes an MCP server that serves your default host, so the agent can list your databases, read schemas, run SQL, and call reducers with your CLI identity.
defaultPrompt: Set up a new SpacetimeDB module in Rust.
Show me the schema for my database.
